title: Verify immutable rule lifecycle
preconditions: Supported and unsupported predicates, active and archived categories, passing validation evidence, and an existing active rule are available.
steps: Save valid and invalid drafts; activate a validated draft; retire and replace active rules; inspect prior versions; rename the referenced category; submit feedback without activation.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-RULE-LIFECYCLE holds: versions and rule sets are immutable and attributable, invalid drafts cannot activate, history remains inspectable, and no event activates automatically.
